items.title: Bitcoin Holds Ground Near $75K Despite Minor Correction
items.excerpt: Bitcoin trades at $75,561 with a modest 0.87% decline over 24 hours, showing relative stability compared to broader crypto market volatility. The leading cryptocurrency continues to maintain strong support levels above the $75,000 psychological barrier.

items.title: Ethereum Faces Pressure as Price Drops to $2,329 Amid Market Uncertainty
items.excerpt: Ethereum experiences a 1.24% decline in 24 hours, trading at $2,329.18 as investors reassess market conditions. The second-largest cryptocurrency by market cap shows signs of consolidation after recent gains.

items.title: RaveDAO Token Crashes 91% in Dramatic Market Selloff
items.excerpt: RaveDAO (RAVE) suffers catastrophic losses, plummeting 91.61% to $1.17 in what appears to be a major liquidation event. The dramatic decline highlights the extreme volatility risks associated with smaller altcoin projects.

items.title: Asteroid Shiba Explodes 961% in Meme Coin Frenzy
items.excerpt: Asteroid Shiba (ASTEROID) rockets 961.56% higher to approximately $0.00035518, becoming the day's biggest gainer. The astronomical surge reflects renewed interest in meme-based cryptocurrencies among retail traders.

items.title: Aave Protocol Faces 17% Decline as DeFi Sector Shows Weakness
items.excerpt: Aave (AAVE) drops 17.90% to $91.39, reflecting broader challenges across decentralized finance protocols. The significant decline raises questions about DeFi token valuations amid changing market dynamics.

items.title: LayerZero Token Slides 9% as Interoperability Projects Face Headwinds
items.excerpt: LayerZero (ZRO) falls 9% to $1.71, continuing a downward trend affecting blockchain interoperability tokens. The decline comes despite growing recognition of cross-chain infrastructure's importance in the evolving crypto ecosystem.
